DFIntVideoServiceMetricsEventstreamRepor.mechanism: Reports video service metrics with increased precision in hundredths of a percent.
DFIntVideoServiceMetricsEventstreamRepor.purpose: Provides more accurate data for developers to analyze video performance and improve user engagement.

FFlagBootcampCLI165710_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new command-line interface for bootcamp features.
FFlagBootcampCLI165710_Staged.purpose: Improves the onboarding experience for new players by streamlining access to tutorials.

FFlagPerformanceControlCreateImGuiOnPlac.mechanism: Activates a performance monitoring tool at the start of a game.
FFlagPerformanceControlCreateImGuiOnPlac.purpose: Helps developers optimize game performance, leading to smoother gameplay for players.

DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.mechanism: Links game data to a specific version in the code repository.
DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString.purpose: Ensures players experience the most up-to-date features and fixes in games.

DFFlagResetNetworkOwnerOnRemovePrimitive.mechanism: Resets the ownership of networked objects when they are removed.
DFFlagResetNetworkOwnerOnRemovePrimitive.purpose: Enhances game stability by preventing issues with object ownership, improving overall gameplay.

DFIntWrapDeformerEventHundredthsPercenta.mechanism: Adjusts how deformation events are processed in the game engine.
DFIntWrapDeformerEventHundredthsPercenta.purpose: Allows for more precise animations and movements, making characters and objects look better.

FFlagUserCheckTouchControlMode.mechanism: Checks if the user is using touch controls for input.
FFlagUserCheckTouchControlMode.purpose: Improves gameplay experience on touch devices by optimizing controls.

FFlagUseTextureTranscoderClientConfig.mechanism: Utilizes a new system for handling textures on the client side.
FFlagUseTextureTranscoderClientConfig.purpose: Enhances the visual quality and performance of textures in games.

FFlagRemoveDeprecatedValidationChecks_St.mechanism: Eliminates old validation checks that are no longer needed.
FFlagRemoveDeprecatedValidationChecks_St.purpose: Streamlines game performance by removing unnecessary checks.

DFFlagClientPacketLimiting_PlaceFilter.mechanism: Limits the number of data packets sent to the client for filtering places.
DFFlagClientPacketLimiting_PlaceFilter.purpose: Reduces lag and improves loading times for players in games.

FFlagSlimNoRandomSeedFromPart.mechanism: Prevents parts from generating random seeds that affect gameplay.
FFlagSlimNoRandomSeedFromPart.purpose: Ensures consistent behavior of parts in games, enhancing predictability.

FFlagLuaAppEnableWhyThisAdModal_Staged.mechanism: Enables a modal that explains why ads are shown in the Lua app.
FFlagLuaAppEnableWhyThisAdModal_Staged.purpose: Helps players understand the presence of ads, improving transparency.

FFlagUserCheckTouchControlMode_Staged.mechanism: Checks if the user is using touch controls on their device.
FFlagUserCheckTouchControlMode_Staged.purpose: Optimizes gameplay experience for touch users by adjusting controls accordingly.

FFlagSongDetailsPageDesignPass.mechanism: Implements a new design for the song details page.
FFlagSongDetailsPageDesignPass.purpose: Enhances the visual appeal and usability of the song details for players.

FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.mechanism: Stores a fast reference to the Git hash for version control.
FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString.purpose: Improves performance by quickly identifying the version of the game assets.

FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration.mechanism: Introduces new layers in the registration process.
FStringIxpNewLayersForRegistration.purpose: Streamlines user registration, making it easier and faster for new players.

FFlagFixGridMinSize_Staged.mechanism: Adjusts the minimum size of grid elements in the UI.
FFlagFixGridMinSize_Staged.purpose: Improves layout consistency and appearance of user interfaces.

DFFlagCLI175686_Staged.mechanism: Enables a new command line interface feature for developers.
DFFlagCLI175686_Staged.purpose: Enhances the development experience by providing better tools for scripting.

FFlagAXSendSessionForEvents_Staged.mechanism: Sends session data for specific events to improve tracking.
FFlagAXSendSessionForEvents_Staged.purpose: Helps developers understand player interactions better for game improvements.

FFlagAXFixConsoleTitleDropdownMissing.mechanism: Fixes an issue where the dropdown for console titles was not appearing.
FFlagAXFixConsoleTitleDropdownMissing.purpose: Ensures players can select titles easily, improving navigation in the console.

DFFlagSocialCounterpartyManagerReplicate.mechanism: Updates how social properties are replicated between users.
DFFlagSocialCounterpartyManagerReplicate.purpose: Enhances social interactions by ensuring accurate sharing of user data.

DFFlagEnableLuaApiToRegisterEncryptedAss.mechanism: Allows developers to register encrypted assets with a filter for specific places using Lua API.
DFFlagEnableLuaApiToRegisterEncryptedAss.purpose: Enhances security by enabling developers to control which places can access their encrypted assets.

FFlagEnableConsoleJoinVoiceTranslation_S.mechanism: Enables voice chat translation features for players joining games on console devices.
FFlagEnableConsoleJoinVoiceTranslation_S.purpose: Improves communication by allowing players who speak different languages to understand each other during gameplay.
